cmd_attach_description: Attach image/video media; use @path for text files or directories
cmd_cache_description: Show DeepSeek prefix-cache hit/miss stats for the last N turns
cmd_compact_description: Trigger context compaction to free up space (legacy; v0.6.6 prefers cycle restart)
cmd_cycle_description: Show the carry-forward briefing for a specific cycle
cmd_cycles_description: List checkpoint-restart cycle handoffs in this session
cmd_diff_description: Show file changes since session start
cmd_edit_description: Revise and resubmit the last message
cmd_home_description: Show home dashboard with stats and quick actions
cmd_goal_description: Set a session goal with optional token budget
cmd_lsp_description: Toggle LSP diagnostics on or off
cmd_share_description: Export current session as a shareable web URL
cmd_jobs_description: Inspect and control background shell jobs
cmd_links_description: Show DeepSeek dashboard and docs links
cmd_logout_description: Clear API key and return to setup
cmd_memory_description: Inspect or manage the persistent user-memory file
cmd_note_description: Append note to persistent notes file (.deepseek/notes.md)
cmd_plan_description: Switch to plan mode and review suggested implementation steps
cmd_provider_description: Switch or view the active LLM backend (deepseek | nvidia-nim)
cmd_recall_description: Search prior cycle archives (BM25 over message text)
cmd_restore_description: Roll back the workspace to a prior pre/post-turn snapshot. With no arg, lists recent snapshots.
cmd_review_description: Run a structured code review on a file, diff, or PR
cmd_rlm_description: Recursive Language Model (RLM) turn — store the prompt in a Python REPL and let the model write code to process it, with `llm_query()` / `sub_rlm()` for sub-LLM calls.
cmd_skill_description: Activate a skill, or install/update/uninstall/trust a community skill
cmd_skills_description: List local skills (or --remote to browse the curated registry)
cmd_stash_description: Park or restore a composer draft (Ctrl+S to push, /stash list/pop)
cmd_statusline_description: Configure which items appear in the footer
cmd_swarm_description: Run a multi-agent fanout turn (sequential | mixture | distill | deliberate)
cmd_trust_description: Manage workspace trust and per-path allowlist (`/trust add <path>`, `/trust list`, `/trust on|off`)
cmd_cache_advice:
Hit/miss ratios over ~70% after the third turn indicate a stable cache prefix; 
lower than that on long sessions suggests prefix churn worth investigating (#263).
cmd_cache_footnote: * miss inferred from input − hit when the provider did not report it explicitly.
cmd_cache_no_data:
Cache history: no turns recorded yet.

DeepSeek surfaces `prompt_cache_hit_tokens` / `prompt_cache_miss_tokens` on every API turn that the model supports it (V4 family). Run a turn and try /cache again.
cmd_cache_totals: Σ in: {sum_in}   Σ hit: {sum_hit}   Σ miss: {sum_miss}   avg hit ratio: {avg}
cmd_cost_report:
Session Cost:
─────────────────────────────
Approx total spent: ${cost}

Cost estimates are approximate and use provider usage telemetry when available.

DeepSeek API Pricing:
─────────────────────────────
Pricing details are not configured in this CLI.
kb_scroll_transcript: Scroll transcript, navigate input history, or select composer attachments
kb_jump_top_bottom: Jump to top / bottom of transcript
kb_jump_top_bottom_empty: Jump to top / bottom (when input is empty)
kb_jump_line_start_end: Jump to start / end of line
kb_delete_char: Delete character before / after the cursor, or remove selected attachment
kb_stash_draft: Stash the current draft (`/stash pop` to restore)
kb_search_history: Search prompt history and recover local drafts
kb_insert_newline: Insert a newline in the composer
kb_close_menu: Close menu, cancel request, discard draft, or clear input
kb_cancel_or_exit: Cancel request, or exit when idle
kb_shell_controls: Open shell controls for a running foreground command
kb_fuzzy_file_picker: Open the fuzzy file picker (insert @path on Enter)
kb_last_message_pager: Open pager for the last message (when input is empty)
kb_selected_details: Open details for the selected tool or message (when input is empty)
kb_backtrack_message: Backtrack to a previous user message (Left/Right step, Enter to rewind)
kb_complete_cycle_modes: Complete /command, queue running-turn follow-up, cycle modes; Shift+Tab cycles reasoning effort
kb_jump_plan_agent_yolo: Jump directly to Plan / Agent / YOLO mode
kb_alt_jump_plan_agent_yolo: Alternative jump to Plan / Agent / YOLO mode
kb_focus_sidebar: Focus Plan / Todos / Tasks / Agents / Auto sidebar
kb_toggle_plan_agent: Toggle between Plan and Agent modes
kb_paste_attach: Paste text or attach a clipboard image
kb_copy_selection: Copy the current selection (Cmd+C on macOS)
kb_context_menu: Open context actions for paste, selection, message details, context, and help
kb_attach_path: Add a local text file or directory to context
kb_help_overlay: Open this help overlay (when input is empty)
clear_conversation_busy: Conversation cleared (plan state busy; run /clear again if needed)
links_tip: Tip: API keys are available in the dashboard console.
home_agent_mode_tip: Agent mode - Use tools for autonomous tasks
home_agent_mode_review_tip: Use Ctrl+X to review in Plan mode before executing
home_agent_mode_yolo_tip: Type /yolo to enable full tool access
home_yolo_mode_tip: YOLO mode - Full tool access, no approvals
onboarding_welcome_desc: A focused terminal workspace for longer model sessions.
onboarding_welcome_step1: You'll add an API key, review trust for this directory, and then land in the chat.
onboarding_welcome_step2: The main composer is multi-line, so you can write full prompts instead of squeezing everything into one line.
onboarding_language_desc: Pick the UI language. You can change it any time with `/settings set locale <tag>`.
onboarding_language_footer: Press {keys} to choose, or {enter} to keep the current setting
onboarding_api_key_step1: Step 1.  Open https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys and create a key.
onboarding_api_key_step2: Step 2.  Paste it below and press Enter.
onboarding_api_key_path_note: Saved to ~/.deepseek/config.toml so it works from any folder.
onboarding_api_key_paste_note: Paste the full key exactly as issued (no spaces or newlines).
onboarding_api_key_footer: Press Enter to save, Esc to go back.
onboarding_trust_prompt: Allow DeepSeek to access files outside this workspace?
onboarding_trust_y_explain: Y = let reviews, searches, and agents reach outside this workspace when a task needs it.
onboarding_trust_n_explain: N = keep file access scoped to this workspace and review approvals case by case.
onboarding_tips_tip1: Write the task in plain language. Use /help or Ctrl+K when you want a command.
onboarding_tips_tip2: The bottom composer is multi-line: Enter sends, Alt+Enter or Ctrl+J adds a new line.
onboarding_tips_tip3: Switch modes only when the job changes: Plan for review-first work, Agent for execution, YOLO when you want auto-approval.
onboarding_tips_tip4: Ctrl+R resumes earlier sessions, and Esc backs out of the current draft or overlay.
approval_impact_write: Writes files in the workspace or an approved write scope.
approval_impact_mcp_action: Performs an MCP action that may change remote state.
approval_staged_hint: Press again to confirm, or any other key to cancel
pager_help_navigate: j/k or Up/Down scroll, g/G top/bottom, q/Esc close
